theme.title: Object Pronouns in Context
theme.description: B1 practice with direct and indirect object pronouns, contrast, and more natural sentence patterns.

lesson.title: Lesson 7: se lo and Related Patterns
lesson.instructions: Practice double-object combinations such as se lo, se la, se los, and se las.

exercises.prompt: I promised Marta the report, and I am going to send it to her tonight.
exercises.answer: Le prometi el informe a Marta y voy a mandarselo esta noche.
exercises.answer_alt: Le prometi el informe a Marta y se lo voy a mandar esta noche.
exercises.explanation: Use 'se lo' or the attached form with an infinitive.

exercises.prompt: Si encuentras mis llaves, por favor devuelvemelas enseguida.
exercises.answer: If you find my keys, please give them back to me right away.
exercises.explanation: Attached pronouns are common with commands.

exercises.prompt: They offered us the apartment, but in the end they rented it to someone else.
exercises.answer: Nos ofrecieron el apartamento, pero al final se lo alquilaron a otra persona.
exercises.explanation: Use 'se lo' because 'le lo' becomes 'se lo'.

exercises.prompt: No queria contarles la noticia por telefono, asi que se la dije en persona.
exercises.answer: I did not want to tell them the news over the phone, so I told it to them in person.
exercises.answer_alt: I did not want to tell them the news over the phone, so I told them in person.
exercises.explanation: Natural English may omit the repeated direct object.

exercises.prompt: Can you explain the rules to us again? You did not explain them to us clearly the first time.
exercises.answer: Puedes explicarnos las reglas otra vez? No nos las explicaste con claridad la primera vez.
exercises.explanation: The second sentence uses both indirect and direct object pronouns.

exercises.prompt: Se los habia guardado, pero alguien los movio de lugar.
exercises.answer: I had saved them for them, but someone moved them.
exercises.explanation: 'Se los' marks both the receiver and the plural direct object.

exercises.prompt: The company sent my parents the documents, but it did not send them the updated version.
exercises.answer: La empresa les envio los documentos a mis padres, pero no se los envio actualizados.
exercises.answer_alt: La empresa les envio los documentos a mis padres, pero no les envio la version actualizada.
exercises.explanation: This contrasts a full direct object with a double-object structure.

exercises.prompt: Cuando termine el diseno, te lo enseno para que me des tu opinion.
exercises.answer: When I finish the design, I will show it to you so that you can give me your opinion.
exercises.explanation: 'Te lo' is a classic B1 double-object pattern.
